app.title: Crop Disease AI - Smart Agriculture
app.subtitle: Intelligent disease detection · Smart recommendations · Weather-based risk analysis
sidebar.name: Name
welcome.title: Welcome to the Future of Farming
welcome.description: Leverage the power of Artificial Intelligence and Computer Vision to protect your crops and maximize yields. Our system can detect diseases from leaf images, analyze severity, provide treatment recommendations, and predict future disease risks based on weather conditions.
welcome.cta_subtitle: Navigate to Disease Detection to begin analyzing your crops.
quick_action.detect_desc: Analyze crop leaf images for disease detection
quick_action.analytics_desc: Track disease trends and crop health metrics
quick_action.history_desc: View past detection records and reports
quick_action.about_desc: Learn about the system and how to use it
tip.title: 💡 Quick Tip
tip.description: Upload a clear, well-lit photo of the affected leaf for the most accurate diagnosis. Capture from multiple angles if possible.
home.title: 🌱 AI Crop Disease Prediction System
home.subtitle: Intelligent disease detection · Smart treatment recommendations · Weather-based risk analysis
home.feature_ai_desc: Upload leaf images for instant disease diagnosis using deep learning with >95% accuracy across 15+ crops.
home.feature_weather_desc: Real-time weather monitoring and 7-day disease risk forecasting powered by OpenWeather API.
home.feature_treatment_desc: Personalized chemical and organic treatment recommendations based on disease, severity, and weather.
home.feature_analytics_desc: Interactive dashboards with disease trends, crop health reports, and exportable analytics.
home.feature_pdf_desc: Generate comprehensive diagnostic reports with images, analysis, and treatment plans.
home.feature_xai_desc: Understand why each diagnosis was made with confidence analysis and visual heatmaps.
home.step1_desc: Take a photo or upload a leaf image of your crop
home.step2_desc: Our CNN model analyzes the image for disease patterns
home.step3_desc: Receive instant disease identification with confidence score
home.step4_desc: Get personalized chemical and organic recommendations
home.step5_desc: Monitor conditions and assess disease risk for 7 days
home.step6_desc: Download comprehensive PDF report for your records
home.footer_subtext: Protect your crops, maximize yields, and make data-driven farming decisions.
detection.title: 🔬 AI Disease Detection
detection.subtitle: Upload a leaf image to detect diseases with AI-powered analysis
detection.unknown_crop_warning: Could not identify the crop type with sufficient confidence. Consider uploading a clearer image or selecting the crop manually.
detection.low_confidence_warning: ⚠️ **Low Confidence Prediction** — Confidence is {confidence:.1f}%. Please upload a clearer image for better accuracy.
detection.crop_confidence_warning: Crop confidence ({confidence:.1f}%) below 95% threshold. Select crop manually or accept auto-detected crop.
detection.error_prediction: Model prediction failed. Please try again.
detection.hint_upload: 👆 Upload or capture an image to start detection
detection.hint_detect: Click 'Detect Disease' to analyze the image
detection.raw_model_caption: What the neural network predicted before crop consistency check
analytics.title: 📊 Analytics Dashboard
analytics.subtitle: Comprehensive insights into crop health, disease patterns, and farm analytics
analytics.no_data: No disease data available yet. Start detecting to populate analytics.
analytics.no_trends: Monthly trend data will appear as you perform disease detection scans.
analytics.no_health: Health distribution will appear after first detection.
analytics.no_history: No detection history yet. Go to Detection page to analyze crops.
analytics.no_daily: Daily analytics will populate as you use the system.
analytics.no_insights: Start detecting diseases to see insights.
kb.title: 📖 Disease Knowledge Base
kb.subtitle: Comprehensive information about crop diseases, symptoms, causes, and treatments
weather.title: 🌤️ Weather Intelligence System
weather.subtitle: Real-time weather monitoring, disease risk prediction, and smart farming recommendations
weather.unable_fetch: Unable to fetch weather data. Check your API key or try again later.
weather.api_not_configured: ⚠️ OpenWeather API key not configured. Weather data will use simulated values. Add `OPENWEATHER_API_KEY=your_key` to `.env` file for real weather data.
weather.no_risk: Select a crop and generate risk prediction.
weather.no_history: No weather logs yet. Weather data is logged automatically when you check conditions.
history.title: 📋 Detection History
history.subtitle: View and manage all crop disease detection records and reports
history.delete_warning: Delete functionality is available through database management tools.
history.no_records: No detection records found. Start by detecting diseases on the Detection page.
about.title: ℹ️ About the System
about.subtitle: AI-Driven Crop Disease Prediction and Management System
about.overview_p1: The AI-Driven Crop Disease Prediction and Management System is a modern AgriTech web application that leverages artificial intelligence to help farmers detect crop diseases early, receive treatment recommendations, monitor weather conditions, and make data-driven farming decisions.
about.overview_p2: Built with Streamlit, TensorFlow, and Computer Vision, the system can identify diseases across 15+ crops with high accuracy, analyze disease severity, predict future disease risks based on weather conditions, and generate comprehensive PDF reports.
about.feature_ai_desc: CNN-based disease classification with confidence scoring across 15+ crops
about.feature_weather_desc: Real-time weather monitoring and 7-day disease risk prediction
about.feature_treatment_desc: Personalized chemical and organic treatment recommendations
about.feature_analytics_desc: Interactive dashboards with disease trends and crop health reports
about.feature_pdf_desc: Comprehensive diagnostic reports with images and analysis
about.feature_xai_desc: Transparent predictions with confidence analysis and visual explanations
about.feature_db_desc: SQLite-based record keeping for predictions, weather, and analytics
about.feature_kb_desc: Comprehensive disease information with search and filter capabilities
about.overview_desc: The AI-Driven Crop Disease Prediction and Management System is a modern AgriTech web application that leverages artificial intelligence to help farmers detect crop diseases early, receive treatment recommendations, monitor weather conditions, and make data-driven farming decisions.
about.overview_tech: Built with Streamlit, TensorFlow, and Computer Vision, the system can identify diseases across 15+ crops with high accuracy, analyze disease severity, predict future disease risks based on weather conditions, and generate comprehensive PDF reports.

about.step1_desc: Take a photo or upload a leaf image of your crop
about.step2_desc: Receive instant disease identification with severity analysis
about.step3_desc: Follow treatment recommendations and monitor disease risk
about.footer_subtext: Making advanced crop disease detection accessible to everyone, helping protect food security and improve farming outcomes.
about.footer_version: Version 1.0.0 | Built with passion for the global farming community
severity.spread_healthy: No disease detected. Continue preventive measures.
severity.spread_mild: Disease detected in early stage. Spread potential is low with proper treatment.
severity.spread_moderate: Disease is actively developing. Moderate spread expected within 1-2 weeks without intervention.
severity.spread_severe: Advanced disease stage. Rapid spread to neighboring plants expected. Immediate action required.
severity.desc_healthy: The crop appears healthy with no signs of disease infection.
severity.desc_mild: Early stage infection detected. Minor symptoms visible. Disease can be controlled with timely intervention.
severity.desc_moderate: Active disease progression. Clear symptoms visible across plant tissue. Requires prompt treatment to prevent yield loss.
severity.desc_severe: Advanced infection stage. Extensive tissue damage observed. Immediate intensive treatment needed to save the crop.
pdf.title: AI-DRIVEN CROP DISEASE DIAGNOSIS REPORT
pdf.weather_title: Weather Conditions at Time of Scan
pdf.footer: This report was generated by the AI-Driven Crop Disease Prediction System. The diagnosis is based on visual analysis and should be confirmed by a certified agricultural expert before implementing treatment.
